systemStatus.headline: Mon Jul 20, 4 AM run. TOAST AND SLING BOTH PENDING -- Sunday Jul 19 sales and today's schedule land ~7 AM PT. Sales below are LAST KNOWN (Sat Jul 18). 3 UNANSWERED GOOGLE REVIEWS across both listings, including a 3-star off the World Cup Final (flat beer, no sightlines) and a new 5-star on BREWHOUSE COFFEE. Draft replies ready -- nothing posted. The 'World Cup HQ 2026' campaign never came off pause and the Final is now behind us.
systemStatus.detail:
Mon Jul 20 04:00 AM PT run.

TIMING: The 4 AM cycle runs ahead of both feeds. Toast's Sun Jul 19 summary and Sling's Mon Jul 20 schedule had not been delivered. Sales and staffing shown are LAST KNOWN carry-forwards (Toast Sat Jul 18, Sling Sun Jul 19), not actuals for the labeled day.

REVIEWS -- BOTH LISTINGS CHECKED. The Brewhouse: Ronald Johnson 3 stars (Jul 19) off the World Cup Final -- seated with no view of the game, burgers 'OK', beer FLAT. The flat-beer note is the operational signal; worth a line check. Thuy Anh Le 5 stars photo-only (Jul 17) still unanswered, now 3 days old. Brewhouse Coffee: Christie Hahn 5 stars (Jul 19) 'A Perfect 10/10 Experience' -- Coffee had ZERO unreplied yesterday, so this is new, and it is exactly the listing that used to get skipped. All three drafts are in the brief; NOTHING WAS POSTED.

GOOGLE ADS: 2 report emails, no disapprovals, no budget alerts. 'World Cup HQ 2026' ($20/day) sat paused through the Final -- that spend window is gone; archive it. Conversion tracking still reporting 0.00.

CARRY-FORWARD WATCH ITEMS: Sat Jul 18 labor 20.3% of net, above the 18-19% band. One order left open at close with Grant Danely auto-clocked out (2nd Saturday running). Malformed 24-hour Sling shift for Isael Salvador Narciso.

toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary (The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group, Sat Jul 18), email received Sun Jul 19 6:26 AM PT. LOCATION-level email (labor $, void $, dayparts, rooms, checks) had not landed at the 7 AM run. SDLW computed locally against the Sat Jul 11 GROUP email.
toast.note: PENDING at the Mon Jul 20 4 AM run -- the Sun Jul 19 Daily Performance Summary had not been delivered (lands ~6:30-7:40 AM PT). Figures shown are LAST KNOWN: Sat Jul 18. Net $9,261.85 / Gross $9,536.85 / 361 guests / 190 orders / avg guest $25.66 / avg order $48.75 / labor 20.3% (above the 18-19% band). vs SDLW (Sat Jul 11): net -7.4%, guests -10.4%, orders -19.1% -- fewer, bigger tickets.

sling.note: TODAY (Mon Jul 20) schedule NOT YET DELIVERED at the 4 AM run (Sling sends ~7:00 AM PT). Figures shown are LAST KNOWN: Sun Jul 19 -- 15 employees / 16 shifts / 74.82 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 0 off. Watch item carried forward: malformed 24-hour shift, Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:31A-4:31A.

slingLastKnown.note: TODAY (Sun Jul 19), email delivered 7:01 AM PT. 15 employees / 16 shifts / 74.82 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 0 off. Heaviest headcount of the week (+2 employees, +2 shifts vs Sat Jul 18) but 2.16 fewer hours -- more people on shorter, tighter shifts, and 11:00-11:30A is the big stack (7 of 16 shifts start in that half hour). ONE malformed 24-hour shift remains: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:31A-4:31A -- down from two yesterday; the Sat Jul 18 Julianna 6:33A-6:33A entry cleared. Julianna Ornelas works a legitimate split today (Barista 6:30A-12:30P then Runner 12:30P-3:00P), back-to-back rather than double-booked. Floor thins after 6:30P: only 5 people carry 6:30P-9:30P and the last shift ends 10:00P.

Watch item carried forward: malformed 24-hour shift, Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:31A-4:31A.

billingPeriod.note: LIVE billing read this run: Jul 1-18 spend $241.57, CPC $0.99, CPL $2.78.

yelpAds.note: LIVE scrape Sun Jul 19 ~7:08 AM PT. Last 30d: 29.9k ad impressions (72% of 41.4k), 397 ad clicks, 525 page visits from ads (57% of 916), 134 leads from ads (58% of 230). Billing Jul 1-18: spend $241.57, CPC $0.99, CPL $2.78 -- running ~$13.42/day, essentially flat. Day-over-day the platform added $13.07 spend, 5 clicks, 2 page visits and 1 lead: steady, unremarkable. 12-mo ad contribution 1,111 ad leads vs 729 organic (60/40); forecast dropped to 98 from 106. Ad Settings pane reports audience size 'Limited' and warns that control features are restricting reach and raising CPC -- worth a look given CPC is 3x Google's $0.36. Bonus budget remaining is STILL not surfaced anywhere on the dashboard (5th consecutive run) -- treat as unavailable, not zero. Yelp Inbox shows 15 unread.

BREWHOUSE COFFEE: 1 unreplied -- Christie Hahn (5 stars, Jul 19, 'A Perfect 10/10 Experience'). Coffee had ZERO unreplied yesterday, so this is genuinely new. Joe (5 stars, Jul 17) and Matthew (Jul 16) were already answered. Draft replies for all 3 are in the Mon Jul 20 brief. NOTHING POSTED -- Joal approves every reply.

unanswered.author: Ronald Johnson
unanswered.snippet: Went for the world cup final got there a little late but the place had tables with no direct view of the game. Secondly just ordered burgers and a pitcher of beer, burgers were OK, beer was flat. Thankfully I was in with good company and none of that mattered
